entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: A type of soil characterized by specific properties, studied in semi-arid tropical India

entities.name: HYDERABAD, INDIA
entities.description: The location of the field experiment conducted at ICRISAT

entities.name: NO-TILL SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural practice of planting crops without disturbing the soil through tillage

entities.name: FARMYARD MANURE
entities.description: An organic amendment added to the soil to improve its properties

entities.name: RICE STRAW
entities.description: Organic residue from Oryza sativa used as soil cover in no-till systems

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Oryza sativa, the crop from which the straw residue is derived

entities.name: RUNOFF
entities.description: The flow of water that occurs when excess stormwater flows over the earth's surface

entities.name: INFILTRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which water enters the soil surface

entities.name: SURFACE CRUST
entities.description: A thin, hardened layer on the soil surface that restricts water infiltration

entities.name: RING INFILTROMETER
entities.description: A tool used to measure the infiltration rate of water into the soil

entities.name: DISC PERMEAMETER
entities.description: A tool used to measure the hydraulic conductivity of the soil

entities.name: REGRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine significant factors affecting runoff

entities.name: PRECIPITATION
entities.description: The amount of rainfall occurring during a specific period

entities.name: RAINFALL INTENSITY
entities.description: The rate of rainfall, specifically measured over a 30-minute interval

entities.name: SOIL COVER
entities.description: The percentage of the soil surface covered by plants or organic residue

entities.name: ORGANIC RESIDUE
entities.description: General term for organic amendments such as farmyard manure and rice straw
